overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient Egyptian robes walking through a moonlit desert oasis. The character travels along a stone path lined with palm trees, passes a wooden cart with a donkey, and transitions onto sand dunes under a clear night sky with a bright moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree lined oasis path at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path through the palm oasis toward the distant dunes

entered.detail: tall date palm trees lining the left side of the path creating an avenue
tall date palm trees lining the right side of the path
large sand dune rising on the right side of the path
rocky dirt path winding through the oasis vegetation
low mud brick buildings visible in the distance on the left horizon
bright full moon visible in the night sky illuminating the scene

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone path through a moonlit desert oasis. Tall palm trees line both sides of the track while a large sand dune rises to the right. The path stretches ahead toward distant mud brick structures visible on the horizon under a clear night sky with a bright full moon.

events.description: a wooden cart with a donkey comes into view on the left side of the path
ground surface transitions from rocky stone to soft sand as the path enters the dune area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing a stationary wooden cart with a harnessed donkey

notable_agents.action: donkey standing harnessed to a wooden cart, stationary on the left side of the path

entered.detail: simple wooden two-wheeled cart parked on the left side of the track

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a wooden cart with a stationary donkey on the left side of the path. The ground gradually transitions from rocky stone to soft sand as the character moves deeper into the dune area, with palm trees receding to the left.

events.description: small desert fox crosses the path quickly from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking up the sand dune slope into the open desert, away from the oasis

notable_agents.action: small fox-like desert animal quickly crossing the sand from left to right in front of the character

entered.detail: steep sand dune slope rising directly ahead in the path

segments.scene_description: The character now walks on pure sand dunes with sparse vegetation, having left the palm oasis behind. A small desert fox darts across the path from left to right. The terrain opens up completely with sand dunes surrounding the path on all sides under the bright moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit oasis that gradually transitions into an open, sandy desert landscape. It begins with the character walking along a stone path lined with tall palm trees, moving toward distant mud brick structures under a bright full moon. As the character progresses, they pass a wooden cart and a stationary donkey on the left while the rocky ground beneath them shifts into soft sand. The scene then opens up as the palm trees recede, leaving the character to traverse pure sand dunes where a small desert fox darts across the path. Finally, the terrain expands completely into a vast expanse of moonlight-drenched dunes with only sparse vegetation remaining.
